emails.subject: Why your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back (and what to look for instead)
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been living with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and haven't found real answers, there's a good reason — and it's not your fault.

Conventional medicine is designed to treat symptoms. Outside The Box Functional Medicine in Marshall, Michigan is designed to find out WHY those symptoms exist in the first place.

Dr. Lori Zettell, DO started OBX after a decade as a wound care specialist — watching patient after patient get medication after medication with no true healing. She knew there had to be a better way.

Functional medicine looks at:
- Life events and disease triggers that conventional labs miss
- Core nutrient deficiencies driving your symptoms
- Genetic and metabolic factors (like SNPs) shaping your health
- Hormonal imbalances and chronic inflammation

The OBX Initial Consultation Package ($950) includes:
- A 2-hour deep-dive consultation with a Functional Medicine Practitioner
- 3 visits with a dedicated health coach
- Comprehensive lab analysis and a customized action plan
- Nutrition counseling

We accept HSA and FSA. We do not accept insurance — because insurance doesn't pay for the time it takes to truly understand your health.

If you're ready to go outside the box for your health, your first step is simple.

With care,
Dr. Lori Zettell, DO
Outside The Box Functional Medicine | Marshall, MI
(269) 268-0410

emails.subject: The hidden reason chronic diseases keep getting worse (most doctors never test for this)
emails.preview: It starts at the cellular level.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's something that never shows up on a standard blood panel:

Most chronic diseases — diabetes, hypertension, thyroid dysfunction, obesity, chronic fatigue — share a common root. They're not random. They're the downstream result of specific, identifiable triggers: nutritional deficiencies, inflammatory responses, genetic predispositions (SNPs), hormone dysregulation, and gut dysfunction.

Conventional medicine waits until disease is established. Functional medicine finds the terrain that allows disease to take hold — and corrects it before or during disease progression.

This is the foundation of everything we do at Outside The Box in Marshall, Michigan.

When you come in for your Initial Consultation Package, here's what happens:

1. We spend 2 full hours understanding your health history, life events, and symptoms
2. We complete a core nutrient analysis — identifying deficiencies standard labs miss
3. We run targeted specialty labs (genetics, gut function, hormones, inflammation markers)
4. We build a customized action plan — specific to your biology, not a template
5. Your health coach meets with you 3 times to help you actually implement it

This is medicine the way it was always supposed to work. And it's why our patients — who've often seen 5, 10, even 15 doctors before coming to us — finally start making progress.

Dr. Lori Zettell, DO
OBX Functional Medicine | 105 W Michigan Ave, Marshall, MI
(269) 268-0410
emails.cta_text: See If Functional Medicine Is Right For You

emails.subject: [FIRST_NAME], what happens when you finally find the root cause
emails.preview: OBX patient stories from Marshall, MI.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Let me tell you about the kind of transformation we see at Outside The Box.

A patient walks in — usually after years of being told 'your labs are normal' or cycling through medications that treat symptoms but never fix anything. They've seen cardiologists, endocrinologists, rheumatologists. Everyone has a piece of the puzzle, but nobody has the full picture.

At OBX, we start from scratch. Two hours, your full story, your labs, your life. And then we start connecting the dots that nobody else connected.

Here's what our patients commonly tell us after working with Dr. Zettell and our team:

'I'd been told I was just 'getting older.' After my initial consultation and functional labs, we found three nutrient deficiencies and a genetic factor nobody had ever tested for. Six months later, I feel 15 years younger.'

'MeRT therapy at the Brain Treatment Center gave my son with autism something we hadn't seen in years: clarity. We're still in treatment but the changes have been remarkable.'

'I lost 34 pounds not by dieting harder, but by finally understanding what was happening hormonally. The health coaching made all the difference in staying consistent.'

*Individual results vary. These experiences are not a guarantee of specific outcomes. Results depend on each person's unique health history, commitment to the program, and response to treatment.*

When you treat the whole person — not just the diagnosis — outcomes change.

Dr. Lori Zettell, DO & the OBX Team
Outside The Box Functional Medicine | Marshall, MI
(269) 268-0410

*Outside The Box does not accept insurance. We accept HSA and FSA.*
